description: Phase 11: Garmin & Strava OAuth Verify & Complete — Enable the OAuth connection UI, verify end-to-end flows, fix token refresh wiring, and ensure webhook data surfaces in the app

userStories.title: Remove 'Coming Soon' flag from Garmin/Strava in health_connection_screen.dart
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/health/presentation/screens/health_connection_screen.dart first
Remove isComingSoon=true flags on Garmin and Strava cards (approx lines 57-69)
Cards show real connection status from healthConnectionsProvider
Connected state shows provider name, last sync time, and Disconnect button
Disconnected state shows Connect button with provider logo
GarminAttributionWidget and StravaAttributionWidget displayed when connected
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: The settings_screen.dart already has working Connect/Disconnect buttons. health_connection_screen.dart is the secondary screen that still hides them. Use the same provider pattern as settings_screen.dart.

userStories.title: Verify Garmin OAuth 1.0a flow end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/health/presentation/health_connections_provider.dart first
Read supabase/functions/oauth-garmin/index.ts
Tap Connect Garmin in settings screen opens browser with Garmin consent URL
After user approves, deep link welltrack://oauth/garmin/callback is caught by app.dart
oauth_verifier parameter extracted and passed to connectGarmin()
Edge Function exchanges verifier for access_token + refresh_token
Tokens stored encrypted in wt_health_connections
UI updates to show Connected state with last sync time
14-day backfill fires (fire-and-forget)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Deep link handler is in app.dart _handleOAuthDeepLink(). Verify AndroidManifest.xml has the intent filter for welltrack:// scheme. If GARMIN_CLIENT_ID/SECRET not set in Supabase secrets, note this as a blocker but do not hardcode credentials.

userStories.title: Verify Strava OAuth 2.0 flow end-to-end
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/health/presentation/health_connections_provider.dart first
Read supabase/functions/oauth-strava/index.ts
Tap Connect Strava in settings screen opens browser with Strava authorization URL
After user approves, deep link welltrack://oauth/strava/callback is caught by app.dart
code parameter extracted and passed to connectStrava()
Edge Function exchanges code for access_token + refresh_token
Tokens stored encrypted in wt_health_connections with athlete metadata
UI updates to show Connected state
14-day backfill fires (fire-and-forget)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Strava uses standard OAuth 2.0. STRAVA_CLIENT_ID must be passed via --dart-define at build time. Verify the redirect URI matches what's registered in the Strava API settings.

userStories.title: Verify disconnect flow for both providers
acceptanceCriteria: Read the disconnect methods in health_connections_provider.dart
Tap Disconnect Garmin shows confirmation dialog
Confirmation calls disconnectGarmin() which hits oauth-garmin DELETE endpoint
Edge Function revokes token (best-effort) and clears wt_health_connections row
UI updates to show Disconnected state immediately
Same flow works for Strava via disconnectStrava()
No orphan webhook events after disconnect
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Garmin revocation is best-effort (may fail silently). Strava calls deauthorize endpoint. Both should set is_connected=false and clear tokens.

userStories.title: Verify token refresh works for expired tokens
acceptanceCriteria: Read supabase/functions/_shared/token-refresh.ts
Read supabase/functions/backfill-health-data/index.ts
refreshGarminToken() correctly exchanges refresh_token for new access_token
refreshStravaToken() correctly exchanges refresh_token for new access_token
New tokens stored back in wt_health_connections
token_expires_at updated correctly
process-webhooks function calls token refresh before making API calls when token is expired
If refresh fails, connection marked as needing re-authorization
userStories.technicalNotes: Token refresh functions exist in _shared/token-refresh.ts. Verify they are actually imported and called by backfill-health-data and process-webhooks. If not wired, add the import and call.

userStories.title: Verify webhook ingestion pipeline (Garmin)
acceptanceCriteria: Read supabase/functions/webhook-garmin/index.ts
Read supabase/functions/process-webhooks/index.ts
Garmin POST to webhook endpoint is validated via HMAC (X-Garmin-Signature)
Event queued to wt_webhook_events with status='pending'
process-webhooks picks up pending events and normalizes payload
Normalized metrics upserted to wt_health_metrics with dedupe_hash
Supported event types: sleeps, stressDetails, userMetrics, dailies, activities
Deregistration event marks connection as disconnected
userStories.technicalNotes: Webhook handler must respond 200 within 30 seconds. Never process inline. GARMIN_CONSUMER_SECRET needed for HMAC validation.

userStories.title: Verify webhook ingestion pipeline (Strava)
acceptanceCriteria: Read supabase/functions/webhook-strava/index.ts
GET request returns hub.challenge for subscription verification
POST event queued to wt_webhook_events with strava_object_id
process-webhooks fetches full activity from Strava API using stored tokens
Activity data normalized to wt_health_metrics (distance, calories, duration)
Deauthorization event clears connection
STRAVA_VERIFY_TOKEN used for subscription verification
userStories.technicalNotes: Strava requires fetching full activity details via their API after receiving the webhook. This requires valid access_token — token refresh must work.

userStories.title: Verify deep-link configuration for Android
acceptanceCriteria: Read android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml
Intent filter exists for welltrack:// scheme
welltrack://oauth/garmin/callback handled by app.dart
welltrack://oauth/strava/callback handled by app.dart
Deep links work when app is in foreground AND background
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: Check AndroidManifest.xml for intent-filter with scheme='welltrack' and host='oauth'. If missing, add the intent filter. Also check if url_launcher or app_links package is needed.

userStories.title: Show Garmin/Strava data in insights dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: Read lib/features/insights/presentation/insights_dashboard_screen.dart
When Garmin is connected, stress score chart shows Garmin-sourced data
VO2 max trend includes Garmin/Strava-sourced estimates
Body battery metric (Garmin-exclusive) displayed when available
Data source indicated on chart (e.g., small Garmin/Strava icon or label)
Charts gracefully handle mixed data sources (Health Connect + Garmin)
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: wt_health_metrics already stores source field. Insights charts read from this table. Verify they don't filter by source='health_connect' only.

userStories.title: Add manual sync button for Garmin/Strava connections
acceptanceCriteria: Settings screen shows 'Sync Now' button next to each connected provider
Tapping calls backfill-health-data Edge Function for that provider
Rate limit enforced: if last backfill < 24h ago, show 'Already synced recently' message
Loading spinner during sync, success/error SnackBar after
last_sync_at updated in wt_health_connections after successful sync
flutter analyze returns 0 errors
userStories.technicalNotes: backfill-health-data Edge Function already exists with 24h rate limit guard. Add a method to HealthConnectionsRepository to trigger it. Wire to a button in settings_screen.dart.
